task_text: add a --version flag to bin/predict that prints the predictor model's training date
add a --list-models flag to bin/predict that prints all supported model names, one per line

Build bin/contribute — a CLI script that lets users opt into sharing their actuals data to improve the predictor model.

Requirements:
- Reads data/actuals_live.jsonl (records written by bin/record-actual)
- Cross-references data/contributed.json to skip already-contributed records
- Shows a summary table of uncontributed records: prediction_id, model, actual_cost, actual_turns, passed, and a truncated task description
- Asks user to confirm which records they want to share (all / pick individua
Rewrite contribution system: predictor/contribute.py uses gh issue create with contributor ID, scripts/process_contributions.py harvests and validates issues
